title: tilia × europaea var. parviflora
intro: Tilia × europaea var. parviflora, also known as dwarf linden or small-flowered linden, is a cultivar of the linden tree, which is a hybrid of Tilia platyphyllos and Tilia cordata. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and sedative effects, making it useful in treating anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tilia × europaea var. parviflora include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and soothing respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote a good night's sleep and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes.
